## ProductionTools.useShellChocolateSelection() function

Hook for managing shell chocolate selection.

Supports selecting from available chocolates, adding new options, and removing options from the list.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function useShellChocolateSelection(options: IUseShellChocolateSelectionOptions): IUseShellChocolateSelectionResult;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[IUseShellChocolateSelectionOptions](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseshellchocolateselectionoptions.md)


</td><td>

Hook configuration


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[IUseShellChocolateSelectionResult](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseshellchocolateselectionresult.md)

Object containing state and actions

## Example


```tsx
const { state, actions } = useShellChocolateSelection({
  baseSpec: { ids: ['choco-001', 'choco-002'], preferredId: 'choco-001' },
  draftSpec: draftVersion?.shellChocolate,
  onUpdateDraft: (spec) => updateDraft({ shellChocolate: spec }),
  onResetDraft: () => updateDraft({ draftVersion: undefined })
});

// Select a chocolate
actions.select('choco-002');

// Add a new chocolate option
actions.addChoice('choco-003');
```
